prompt: Create a realistic horizontal 16:9 product-advertising still for wireless earphones. Show a young Japanese woman sitting on a light-colored sofa in a bright modern living room, viewed from the side at medium close-up. She has dark hair tied in a loose bun and wears a cream knit sweater; her face is intentionally hidden by a plain beige rectangular privacy block centered over the face. A sleek black wireless earbud is visible in her right ear, and she holds a dark smartphone in her left hand while her other hand is raised gently near her chin, suggesting she is listening to audio. Use soft natural daylight from sheer white curtains on the left, a clean cozy interior, shallow depth of field, a small green plant blurred in the background, and a calm premium lifestyle mood. On the left side, add bold Japanese ad copy in black: すべてが進化した、\n次世代のサウンド体験を。. Beneath it add smaller black product text ワイヤレスイヤホン, followed by a prominent blue year 2026 and a small outlined rounded badge reading NEW. Keep the typography crisp, modern, and minimal, with generous white space and the woman occupying the right half of the frame.
